curriculum.subject: Tamil
curriculum.overallDescription: 7 units, 23 chapters, and 0 topics extracted through raw extraction, document-structure hierarchy building, node enrichment, normalized teaching blocks, validation, and statistics generation.

units.description: நீரின்றி அமையாது உலகு, பெரியபுராணம், புறநானூறு, தண்ணீர், பகுபத உறுப்பிலக்கணம்
மணிமேகலை, தாய்மைக்கு வறட்சி இல்லை!, ஆகுபெயர், திருக்குறள்
கல்வியில் சிறந்த பெண்கள், குடும்ப விளக்கு, உயிர்வகை, துணை வினைகள்
சிற்பக்கலை, காவணக் காவியம், செய்தி, வல்லினம் மிகும் இடங்கள், திருக்குறள்

competency_groups.title: Reading Comprehension
competency_groups.description: Ability to analyze and extract information from unseen passages across various domains.
competencies: Analyze unseen passages in Mozhi, Ilakkiyam, Varalaru, and Ariviyal
Respond to multiple-choice questions based on reading comprehension
Provide short answers based on textual evidence from unseen passages

competency_groups.title: Grammatical Proficiency
competency_groups.description: Application of Tamil linguistic rules and structural grammar.
competencies: Identify and apply Ezhutthu and Alabedai
Apply Thodar Ilakkanam and Aagupeyar concepts
Utilize Thunai vinaigal correctly in context
Distinguish between Vallinam migum idangal and Vallinam migaa idangal

competency_groups.title: Literary Analysis and Interpretation
competency_groups.description: Understanding and interpreting prose, poetry, and non-detailed texts.
competencies: Analyze themes in Prose (e.g., Dravida Mozhi Kudumbam, Sirpakalai)
Interpret poetic meaning and structure in Poetry (e.g., Periya Puraanam, Thirukkural)
Synthesize information from Non-detail texts (e.g., Thanneer, Seithi)

competency_groups.title: Creative and Formal Writing
competency_groups.description: Ability to produce structured written communication in Tamil.
competencies: Draft Official and Informal letters following standard formats
Compose coherent and structured essays on given topics
Provide descriptive text based on visual stimuli (Picture Description)

marks_distribution.details: Unseen passage- MCQ (5 marks), Unseen Passage - Short Answer (5 marks)
MCQ covering Ezhutthu, Alabedai, Pagubatha Uruppilakkanam, Thodar Ilakkanam, Aagupeyar, Thunai vinaigal, Vallinam migum idangal, Vallinam migaa idangal, Yappilakkanam
